headline: Applied Materials Balances Sector Turbulence With Long Term Chip Demand Story
summary: Geopolitical tensions and energy price shocks have disrupted the semiconductor sector, affecting NasdaqGS:AMAT and its peers. Institutional investors have reduced holdings in Applied Materials, while insider selling has added to questions around sentiment. An extended expiration of a tender offer has introduced another source of uncertainty for shareholders. Applied Materials is highlighting long-term demand trends, its EPIC co-innovation initiative, and efforts to address rising chip...

headline: AMAT Climbs 33.4% in 3 Months: Time to Buy, Sell or Hold the Stock?
summary: Applied Materials surges 33.4% in three months, beating sector peers as strength in logic, DRAM and HBM demand fuels growth prospects.

headline: ASML's Revenue Mix is Changing: What are the Latest Growth Drivers?
summary: ASML Holding's revenue mix is shifting as EUV demand tied to AI chips rises, while China's contribution falls and South Korea and Taiwan pick up the slack.
